title: Sentimentality
description: 27+ new Tool types, 10+ furnace/blast/smoker variants, 9 compressed block types, tons of QoL
body:
![infographic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kfQoDQcj/images/ea8e365454731b4c46a7d506bed2a77cc1142a25.png)
# New Tools Materials
## Wood Tier
* Oak
* Birch
* Spruce
* Jungle
* Acacia
* Dark Oak
* Crimson
* Warped
* Netherrack
## Stone Tier
* Flint
* Granite
* Diorite
* Andesite
* Netherbrick
* Red Netherbrick
* Sandstone
* Red Sandstone
* Blackstone
* Basalt
* Endstone
* Deepslate
## Iron Tier
* Copper - Stone Speed
* Quartz - Diamond Damage
* Lapis - Gold Enchantability 
* Emerald - Diamond Durability
* Redstone - Gold speed
* Amethyst

# New Furnaces
All come in Furnace, Blast Furnace and Smoker variants
* Sandstone
* Red Sandstone
* Granite
* Diorite
* Andesite
* Netherbrick
* Blackstone
* Basalt
* Endstone
* Deepslate

# Compressed Blocks
* Cobblestone
* Dirt
* Granite
* Diorite
* Andesite
* Netherrack
* Deepslate
* Tuff
* Calcite

# QoL
* Rotten Flesh Cooks to Rabbit Hide
* Rotten Flesh * 4 = Fleather cooks to Leather
* Char/Coal Nuggets
* Clocks/Compass on UI
* Handheld Chunkloader (uses vanilla /chunkload command. Is buggy)
* Personal Daylight Detector (no more light level overlay)
* Slime chunk locator
* visual durability on tools
* ping numbers
* countless minor changes
